summary: Phase 1.5 ad performance analyzer: trains ROAS regressor and scale/cut/hold classifier on campaign/day features with account baselines, reports ROAS MAPE on held-out window, handles sparse ad history with low-confidence hold.

criticalFindings.description: Golden fixture augmentation required for stable scale/cut predictions on small synthetic datasets. — Rationale: Documented in ADR-017 and train.py; production backtest runs use larger datasets.

interfaceChanges.description: Train ROAS regressor + action classifier; writes metrics.json with roas_mape and training_log.json.
Campaign/day frame with derived action labels from ROAS vs account baseline rules.

mappings.criterion: CLI train writes metrics JSON including ROAS MAPE on held-out window
Inference output schema action confidence predicted_roas
Golden scale candidate returns scale with confidence above hold threshold
Golden cut candidate returns cut action
Sparse-history campaign returns hold with low confidence

findings.description: Golden fixture augmentation required for stable scale/cut predictions on small synthetic datasets. — Rationale: Documented in ADR-017 and train.py; production backtest runs use larger datasets.

maintainabilityFindings.description: Golden fixture augmentation required for stable scale/cut predictions on small synthetic datasets. — Rationale: Documented in ADR-017 and train.py; production backtest runs use larger datasets.
